name: takomi-codex
description: Takomi orchestration, policy, and roadbook adapter for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use Takomi lifecycle orchestration inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Takomi Codex brings Takomi's Genesis, Design, Build, review, policy, and markdown roadbook workflows into Codex while adapting to local Pi/Takomi runtime state when present.
defaultPrompt: Use Takomi to plan this feature.
